caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a cream-colored Nehru vest, speaks from behind a wooden podium. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green stone wall with geometric recessed patterns. To his left and right are tall, cylindrical glass columns containing decorative pink flowers and gold-colored metal accents. Two microphones are attached to the podium, extending toward him. As the scene progresses, the man uses various hand gestures to emphasize his points; he begins with his hands slightly raised and blurred by movement, then points his right index finger upward, followed by opening his hand in a gesture, and finally brings his hands closer to his chest while speaking. The background and his clothing remain constant throughout the sequence, while only his facial expressions and hand positions shift.
